Certified Layered Security Specialist

Certification Built to:

DRIVE SALES START CONVERSATIONS BUILD PARTNERSHIPS DRIVE SALES

Build the confidence to lead meaningful security conversations, identify customer risk, and position layered security solutions that protect devices, documents, users, and data.

Download Certification Guide (PDF)
Start Certification

Why This Certification Is Different

This is not just training. It is proof you can apply layered security.

The Certified Layered Security Specialist program connects learning, SSE collaboration, customer discovery, and real business opportunity. To earn the designation, participants do more than complete coursework- they build stronger customer conversations, increase credibility, and demonstrate the ability to turn layered security knowledge into more qualified opportunities.

Learn the Framework

Build practical knowledge of layered security, document security, device protection, secure workflow, and customer risk.

Collaborate With Your SSE

Engage your Solutions and Services Executive early to shape the opportunity, align the right solution, and strengthen the customer conversation.

Create a $5,000 Opportunity

Certification requires a qualifying Layered Security opportunity valued at $5,000 or more, proving you can apply the model in a real sales environment.

Earn the Designation

Complete the requirements and earn recognition as a Certified Layered Security Specialist, including certification assets and internal visibility.

Course Path

Complete the 12-course path.

Explore the courses that build shared language, customer discovery skills, and layered security confidence.

The 12-course path moves from security fundamentals to customer discovery, solution positioning, and real-world success stories.

Course 1 of 12

01

Layered Security Certification Introduction and Program Overview

Introduces the Layered Security certification process, sales approach, expectations, tracking requirements, and customer conversation model.

02

Layered Security: Introducing the Model

Explains how to use the Layered Security Model to discuss data and document security risks with customers.

03

bizhub Security at the MFP

Prepares learners to lead with bizhub SECURE and explain how MFP security supports compliance and data protection.

04

MFP Protection Team

Covers the security outcomes provided by bizhub SECURE, bizhub SECURE Notifier, and Bitdefender.

05

User Authentication and Access Control

Helps learners position user authentication and access control capabilities in customer conversations.

06

Document Security

Explains document security outcomes including queue cleanup, encryption, audit reporting, and watermarking.

07

BreachAlert

Shows how BreachAlert helps detect potential MFP document and data breaches and protect customer information.

08

Centralized Security Management

Prepares learners to explain monitoring, visibility, and automatic remediation across an MFP fleet.

09

Secure Workflow

Equips learners to uncover security gaps, identify workflow risks, and connect secure workflows to business outcomes.

10

Success Case Study Story for Healthcare

Shows how to use a real healthcare layered-security win to strengthen customer conversations and support multi-solution sales.

11

Success Case Study for Non-Profit

Uses a nonprofit layered-security success story to strengthen discovery, risk positioning, and trust-building conversations.

12

Success Case Study for Government

Uses a government layered-security success story to support security, compliance, and multi-solution customer discussions.

Certification Process

How Certification Is Earned

Complete the required learning path, collaborate with your SSE, apply layered security in a real customer opportunity, and submit your completion requirements to earn the Certified Layered Security Specialist designation.

Step 1 of 4

01

Complete the Learning Path

Complete the 12-course Layered Security curriculum to build the knowledge and confidence needed for customer security conversations.

02

Collaborate with Your SSE

Partner with your Solutions and Services Executive early to strengthen discovery, solution design, and customer conversations.

03

Complete a $5,000 Opportunity

Demonstrate your skills by completing a qualifying Layered Security opportunity valued at $5,000 or more.

04

Earn Your Certification

Submit your completed requirements and receive your Certified Layered Security Specialist designation and recognition.
